evals.fixed: Added Workspace Name Derivation behavior with URL/path algorithms, Updating Denormalized Idea Counts behavior with increment/decrement rules, Updating Idea Memory Fields on Completion behavior, Idea Memory Corpus Derivation behavior. Added 5 edge cases for counts during regeneration, corpus inclusion/exclusion rules, and workspace derivation. Added 8 testing criteria for new behaviors. Fixed 'derived from repo config' vagueness with cross-reference to derivation behavior.

Added state_of_the_world.json dump to Processing Cancel and Processing an Optimizer Error behaviors. Added explicit error handling for dump failure and WS2 send failure. Added Updating Current Detail behavior. Added 7 edge cases: backward state transition, proceed with empty ideas, current_detail lifecycle (clear on transition, set from progress_phase), state dump on cancel, state dump on error. Added 7 testing criteria for all new behaviors and edge cases.

Removed duplicate 'Sending run_complete on Terminal States' behavior — ownership is in individual terminal behaviors (proceed, cancel, error). Fixed Invariant 4 to clarify exactly-one send per terminal transition. Added WS1 Send Failure Handling section covering portal disconnect and multi-connection scenarios. Added 'Serving State of the World on Portal Connect' behavior. Added 'Handling Optimizer Events with Unknown run_id' behavior. Added 4 edge cases (portal disconnect, stale run_id, state_of_the_world on connect mid-reviewing). Added 6 testing criteria for new behaviors and edge cases.

Added Workspace Output Orchestration behavior with explicit 8-step ordering (idea files → metadata → memory → set workspace_path → state dump last). Added Workspace Output on Cancel or Failure behavior for 9800/9900 paths. Added exclusion notes for optimizer log directory and state clearing. Reformulated Invariants 5 and 6 as filesystem-verifiable properties. Added 3 testing criteria for orchestration ordering, cancel-only output, and failed-run output.

Removed stale 'Rescore sends current content' from Implements section (belongs to Translating Portal and Optimizer Messages spec). Replaced vague 'no event arrives within a reasonable time' with precise failure detection mechanism: WS2 connection close/read error/write error with no per-idea timeout. Enumerated all six ReviewContext fields explicitly in regenerated_idea event step.
